reviews.comment:
Un punto estratégico para abasterse de combustible en la ruta.  Instalaciones en óptimo estado. Atención muy prolija y amable. Es posible estacionarse por amplio lugar ideal para hacer una pausa un minimercado muy completo, Normalmente es sencillo cargar combustible, no hay mucha espera, los baños son pequeños y suelen estar limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A strategic fueling point along the route. Facilities in excellent condition. Very thorough and friendly service. Ample parking is available, ideal for a break. There's a well-stocked mini-market. Fueling is usually easy, with minimal wait times. The restrooms are small but generally clean.

reviews.comment:
Concurrimos el 13/1 a mediodia. Las estrellas son por la amabilidad, tanto de las chicas que nos atendieron en la full como de los playeros, me animó la buena predisposición al ofrecerme prepararme un sandwich de queso en un rico pan  , dado que siendo vegetariana no habia opciones disponibles para almorzar, al menos en ese momento. Considero que deberían tener más provista la full ya que en muchos kilómetros y de ruta extremadamente complicada , no hay otro lugar donde parar y descansar un poco.
Lo negativo, muy negativo,  al llegar, los baños (mujeres) estaban sucios, y la empleada de limpieza estaba en la puerta, mirando el celular y conversando , pensé que en un rato iba a limpiarlos ya que estaba ahi, pasó una hora , pedimos la comida, almorzamos, ya listos para seguir viaje intenté pasar por el baño nuevamente, la situación era similar, la persona mencionada seguia conversando relajadamente y el baño sucio, mi esposo le comentó al playero lo sucedido, ahi recién puso el cartel de no pasar, con otras personas intentamos ir entonces al de discapacitados, como última opción antes de salir, resultó que tambien era un asco de sucio.

(Translated by Google)
We visited on January 13th at midday. The stars are for the friendliness of both the girls who served us at the rest stop and the beach attendants. I was especially touched by their willingness to make me a cheese sandwich on delicious bread, since, being vegetarian, there were no other lunch options available, at least not at that time. I think they should better stock the rest stop, as along a long and extremely difficult road, there's nowhere else to stop and rest.

The negative, very negative, thing was that upon arrival, the women's restrooms were filthy, and the cleaning lady was standing at the door, looking at her phone and chatting. I thought she'd clean them soon since she was already there, but an hour passed. We ordered food, ate lunch, and ready to continue our trip, I tried to go to the restroom again. The situation was similar; the cleaning lady was still chatting casually, and the restroom was dirty. My husband told the attendant what had happened, and only then did he put up the "No Entry" sign. With some other people, we then tried the accessible restroom as a last resort before leaving, but it turned out to be disgustingly dirty as well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21OU1YzcHFPRWxUVHpoNFJYRlRZV2h0V0haWmNsRRAB
